tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: All measured parameters are within or close to normal limits, except for mildly decreased total CO₂ (suggesting possible mild metabolic acidosis) and slightly elevated LDL cholesterol. Glycemic control, renal function, and electrolytes are normal. Lipid profile is overall acceptable for age, but LDL could be optimized. No evidence of significant renal or metabolic derangement. Recommend clinical correlation and routine follow-up.

display.value: Neuropathy due to type 2 diabetes mellitus

tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
